title: Louisiana net income defined
doc_html:
§287.67.  Louisiana net income defined

"Louisiana net income" means net income which is earned within or derived from sources within the state of Louisiana.  

Acts 1986, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 16, §1, eff. Dec. 24, 1986.
